commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And it shall come to pass in that day, that the light shall not be clear, nor dark: No light; viz. , in that dismal time of the persecution of Antiochus, when it was neither day nor night, (ver. ) because they neither had the comfortable light of the day, nor the repose of the night. (Challoner) Darkness denotes distress. The citizens shall be in despair, Matthew xxiv. , and Ezechiel xxii. , and Joel ii. , and Apocalypse ix. Hebrew seems to be corrupt: "no precious light, but thick "or a cloud.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: No light: Viz., in that dismal time of persecution of Antiochus, when it was neither day nor night: (ver. 7) because they neither had the comfortable light of the day, nor the repose of the night.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
